metoffice.title: Yellow warning of wind affecting South West England
metoffice.summary: Yellow warning of wind affecting South West England: Bath and North East Somerset, Cornwall, Devon, Isles of Scilly, North Somerset, Plymouth, Somerset, Torbay valid from 0400 Thu 25 Dec to 2359 Thu 25 Dec

heat.text: Little impact observed on health, healthcare services and social care provision. Business as usual.

cold.text:
Forecast weather is likely to have minor impacts on health and social care services, including:

  • increased use of healthcare services by vulnerable people
  • greater risk to life of vulnerable people
